key.name: node-gridlines
key.description: Whether gridlines should be displayed in the node editor.

key.name: node-minimap
key.description: Whether minimap should be displayed in the node editor.

key.name: sheet-gridlines
key.description: Whether gridlines should be displayed in the sheet editor.

key.name: sheet-locators
key.description: Whether locators should be displayed in the sheet editor.

key.name: sheet-formula-bar
key.description: Whether formula bar should be displayed in the sheet editor.

key.name: sheet-focus-cell
key.description: Whether focus cell should be enabled in the sheet editor.
